backend/main.mo: Defines all core backend types for racing, players, groups, subscriptions, teams, messaging, store, and track data but contains no functional logic.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence records mapping requested features to relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides descriptive summaries of many frontend components, hooks, pages, and styles for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme variables, dark mode values, and global styling rules.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML document mounting the React application and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring authentication flow and TanStack Router routes for menu, store, chat, and payment pages.
frontend/src/components/AIRace.tsx: Wrapper component that renders AIRaceTrack and passes through an onExit callback.
frontend/src/components/AIRaceSimple.tsx: Empty placeholder file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/AIRaceTrack.tsx: Complex AI racing component rendering cars, track, weather, audio, and race flow using react-three-fiber with backend-integrated hooks.
frontend/src/components/F1RaceTrack.tsx: Implements a 3D racing scene using React Three Fiber with cars, track, lighting, weather effects, and HUD UI; manages player car state and visuals.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a footer with branding and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/FriendsManager.t: Provides UI to add, list, and remove friends using principal IDs with backend query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Groups.tsx: Displays racing groups and supports creating and joining groups through dialogs and query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the top navigation bar with theme toggle and Internet Identity authentication controls.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboards.tsx: Shows global and friends leaderboards with ranking tables and loading states.
frontend/src/components/Matchmaking.tsx: Handles matchmaking flow, simulating search progress and launching the F1RaceTrack when a race starts.
frontend/src/components/PlayerProfile.ts: Displays the user's profile, race stats, and friends with loading states and formatted stats.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for creating a new player profile by entering a name and sending profile data to the server.
frontend/src/components/race/RaceHUDOver: Shows lap count, speed, and control hints overlayed during a race.
frontend/src/components/race/RaceXPHUD.t: Displays current XP and recent XP gains with animated badges.
frontend/src/components/race/RealisticRo: Renders a 3D road course with textures, curbs, and guardrails, adapting materials based on weather.
frontend/src/components/race/RealisticSp: Renders a detailed 3D sports car model with dynamic positioning, rotation, and wheel animation.
frontend/src/components/race/stuntDetect: Provides logic to detect airborne stunts using telemetry and cooldown rules.
frontend/src/components/race/useCarContr: Tracks keyboard input for driving controls and outputs throttle and steering values.
frontend/src/components/race/useChaseCam: Implements a smooth chase camera that follows a target based on position, rotation, and speed.
frontend/src/components/race/XPCoinTypes: Defines XP coin metadata and helpers for retrieving coin images and colors.
frontend/src/components/store/storeCatal: Defines StoreItemData and exports a static catalog of neon light items with cost, colors, and images.
frontend/src/components/store/StoreItemC: UI card component that displays a store item and handles purchase, ownership state, and button logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refetching queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEngineAudio.ts: Provides engine‑sound synthesis using Web Audio API with controls for start, stop, volume, and speed.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity auth state, login, logout, and context provider using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profiles, race stats, leaderboards, friends, and other backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useRaceAudio.ts: Audio hook that loads an audio file and exposes play, pause, stop, volume, and mute controls.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers, CSS variables for themes, and neon utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with React Query and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: Implements chat UI with friend list, message display, and message sending via hooks.
frontend/src/pages/MainMenu.tsx: Renders main navigation tabs and cards linking to multiplayer, groups, team, profile, and other sections.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Displays payment cancellation notice with options to retry or return home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Shows successful payment message and auto-redirect countdown to home.
frontend/src/pages/Plans.tsx: Displays subscription plans and starts Stripe checkout sessions for premium upgrades.
frontend/src/pages/Store.tsx: Renders the store page showing XP balance, earning info, and purchasable items, handling item purchases via query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Team.tsx: Displays team roster and allows users to join, change roles, or leave the team using dialog inputs and query mutations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning them from hashes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, animations, and container settings with plugins.
project_state.json: Metadata describing the project state, required images, and existing features for the racing experience.
